items.name: Realistic Tree Body - Nature Wood Suit
items.description: A high-quality Tree Body for your Roblox avatar. This Nature-themed bundle features detailed bark and root designs. Whether you want to be a living tree, an Ent, or a forest protector, this Wooden Suit is a must-have for your collection.
